<fragment>
    <!--
        Fragment: Set Response Headers
        Purpose: Adds UAIG-* response headers exposing internal gateway state for debugging
                 and observability. These headers help trace request processing through the gateway.
                 Headers are only injected when enableResponseHeaders is set to true.

        Requires: enableResponseHeaders (bool, default: false) - Controls whether headers are injected

        Input Variables (all optional, from upstream fragments):
        - auth-type, user-id, subscription-name (from security-handler)
        - requestedModel (from request-processor)
        - api-type, routing-processed-path, selected-api-version, is-streaming (from request-processor)
        - selected-backend (aliased from targetBackendPool in unified-ai-api-policy)
        - cache-operation (from central-cache-manager)
        - config-models (from central-cache-manager)
        - finalPath (from path-builder)

        Output: UAIG-* HTTP response headers (when enableResponseHeaders is true)
    -->

    <choose>
        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<bool>("enableResponseHeaders", false))">
            <!-- Authentication Context -->
            <set-header name="UAIG-Auth-Type" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("auth-type", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>
            <set-header name="UAIG-User-Id" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("user-id", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>
            <set-header name="UAIG-Subscription" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("subscription-name", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>

            <!-- Request Processing Context -->
            <set-header name="UAIG-Model-Id" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("requestedModel", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>
            <set-header name="UAIG-API-Type" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>
            <set-header name="UAIG-Processed-Path" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("routing-processed-path", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>
            <set-header name="UAIG-API-Version" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("selected-api-version", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>
            <set-header name="UAIG-Is-Streaming" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<bool>("is-streaming", false).ToString().ToLower())</value>
            </set-header>

            <!-- Backend Context -->
            <set-header name="UAIG-Backend" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("selected-backend", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>
            <set-header name="UAIG-Final-Path" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("finalPath", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>

            <!-- Cache Context -->
            <set-header name="UAIG-Cache-Operation" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("cache-operation", "not-set"))</value>
            </set-header>

            <!-- Gateway Metadata -->
            <set-header name="UAIG-Request-Id" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.RequestId.ToString())</value>
            </set-header>
            <set-header name="UAIG-Gateway-Region" exists-action="override">
                <value>@(context.Deployment.Region)</value>
            </set-header>
        </when>
    </choose>
</fragment>
variables.$fxv#2:
<fragment>
    <choose>
        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiAnonymizationEnabled") == "true")">
            <!-- Get configuration values -->
            <set-variable name="piiConfidenceThreshold" value="@(double.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiConfidenceThreshold", "0.8")))" />
            <set-variable name="piiEntityCategoryExclusions" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiEntityCategoryExclusions", ""))" />
            <set-variable name="piiDetectionLanguage" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiDetectionLanguage", "en"))" />
            <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://cognitiveservices.azure.com" output-token-variable-name="msi-access-token" client-id="{{uami-client-id}}" ignore-error="false" />
            
            <!-- Process regex patterns if provided -->
            <set-variable name="piiRegexMappings" value="@{
                var content = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiInputContent");
                var regexPatterns = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiRegexPatterns");
                var mappings = new JArray();
                
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(regexPatterns))
                {
                    var patterns = JArray.Parse(regexPatterns);
                    var categoryCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();
                    var processedTexts = new HashSet<string>(); // Track already processed texts
                    
                    foreach (var pattern in patterns)
                    {
                        var regex = new Regex(pattern["pattern"].ToString());
                        var category = pattern["category"].ToString();
                        
                        if (!categoryCounts.ContainsKey(category))
                        {
                            categoryCounts[category] = 0;
                        }
                        
                        var matches = regex.Matches(content);
                        foreach (Match match in matches)
                        {
                            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(match.Value))
                            {
                                // Skip if we already have a mapping for this text
                                if (processedTexts.Contains(match.Value))
                                {
                                    continue;
                                }
                                
                                var placeholder = $"<{category}_{categoryCounts[category]}>";
                                mappings.Add(new JObject {
                                    ["original"] = match.Value,
                                    ["placeholder"] = placeholder,
                                    ["source"] = "regex"
                                });
                                categoryCounts[category]++;
                                processedTexts.Add(match.Value); // Mark this text as processed
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                return mappings.ToString();
            }" />

            <!-- Apply regex-based masking -->
            <set-variable name="piiRegexProcessedContent" value="@{
                var content = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiInputContent");
                var mappings = JArray.Parse(
                    context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiRegexMappings"));
                
                foreach (var mapping in mappings)
                {
                    content = content.Replace(
                        mapping["original"].ToString(),
                        mapping["placeholder"].ToString()
                    );
                }
                return content;
            }" />

            <!-- Update input content for API processing -->
            <set-variable name="piiInputContent" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiRegexProcessedContent"))" />
            
            <!-- Call PII Anonymization API -->
            <send-request mode="new" response-variable-name="piiAnalysisResponse" timeout="20" ignore-error="true">
                <set-url>{{piiServiceUrl}}/language/:analyze-text?api-version=2022-05-01</set-url>
                <set-method>POST</set-method>
                <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                    <value>application/json</value>
                </set-header>
                <set-header name="Authorization" exists-action="override">
                    <value>@("Bearer " + (string)context.Variables["msi-access-token"])</value>
                </set-header>
                <!-- <set-header name="Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key" exists-action="override">
                    <value>{{piiServiceKey}}</value>
                </set-header> -->

                <set-body>@{
                    var request = new JObject();
                    request["kind"] = "PiiEntityRecognition";
                    request["parameters"] = new JObject{
                        {"modelVersion", "latest"},
                        {"redactionPolicy", new JObject{
                            {"policyKind", "CharacterMask"},
                            {"redactionCharacter", "#"}
                        }}
                    };
                    request["analysisInput"] = new JObject{
                        {"documents", new JArray{
                            new JObject{
                                {"text", context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiInputContent")},
                                {"id", "1"},
                                {"language", context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiDetectionLanguage")}
                            }
                        }}
                    };
                    return request.ToString();
                }</set-body>
            </send-request>
            <!-- Process PII Analysis Response and store mappings -->
            <set-variable name="piiMappings" value="@{
                var response = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<IResponse>("piiAnalysisResponse");
                var confidenceThreshold = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<double>("piiConfidenceThreshold");
                var exclusions = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiEntityCategoryExclusions")
                    .Split(new[] { ',' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
                    .Select(c => c.Trim())
                    .ToList();
                
                var entities = JObject.Parse(response.Body.As<string>())
                    .SelectToken("$.results.documents[0].entities")
                    .ToObject<JArray>()
                    .Where(e => e["confidenceScore"].Value<double>() >= confidenceThreshold)
                    .Where(e => !exclusions.Contains(e["category"].ToString()))
                    .OrderByDescending(e => e["text"].ToString().Length);
                
                var mappings = new JArray();
                var categoryCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();
                var processedTexts = new HashSet<string>(); // Track already processed texts
                
                foreach (var entity in entities) {
                    var text = entity["text"].ToString().TrimEnd('.', ',', ' ');
                    
                    // Skip if this text has already been processed
                    if (processedTexts.Contains(text)) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    
                    var category = entity["category"].ToString();
                    
                    if (!categoryCounts.ContainsKey(category)) {
                        categoryCounts[category] = 0;
                    }
                    
                    var placeholder = $"<{category}_{categoryCounts[category]}>";
                    mappings.Add(new JObject {
                        ["original"] = text,
                        ["placeholder"] = placeholder
                    });
                    
                    categoryCounts[category]++;
                    processedTexts.Add(text); // Mark this text as processed
                }
                
                return mappings.ToString();
            }" />

            <!-- Merge API and regex mappings -->
            <set-variable name="piiMappings" value="@{
                var apiMappings = JArray.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiMappings") ?? "[]");
                var regexMappings = JArray.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiRegexMappings") ?? "[]");
                
                foreach (var mapping in regexMappings)
                {
                    apiMappings.Add(mapping);
                }
                
                return apiMappings.ToString();
            }" />

            <!-- Replace PII with placeholders and set output variable -->
            <set-variable name="piiAnonymizedContent" value="@{
                var content = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiInputContent");
                var mappings = JArray.Parse(
                    context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiMappings"));
                    
                foreach (var mapping in mappings) {
                    var original = mapping["original"].ToString();
                    var placeholder = mapping["placeholder"].ToString();
                    content = content.Replace(original, placeholder);
                }
                
                return content;
            }" />
        </when>
        <otherwise>
            <!-- When PII anonymization is disabled, just pass through the original content -->
            <set-variable name="piiAnonymizedContent" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiInputContent"))" />
        </otherwise>
    </choose>
</fragment>
variables.$fxv#3:
<fragment>
    <!-- Replace placeholders with original PII -->
    <set-variable name="piiDeanonymizedContentOutput" value="@{
        var content = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiDeanonymizeContentInput");
        
        // Pre-process content to replace common encoded symbols
        content = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(content, @"\\u003c", "<");
        content = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(content, @"\\u003e", ">");
        
        var mappings = JArray.Parse(
            context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiMappings"));
        
        foreach (var mapping in mappings) {
            var original = mapping["original"].ToString();
            var placeholder = mapping["placeholder"].ToString();
            content = content.Replace(placeholder, original);
        }
        return content;
    }" />
</fragment>
variables.$fxv#4:
<fragment>
    <!-- Save PII anonymization/deanonymization state to Event Hub using native log-to-eventhub policy -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiStateSavingEnabled") == "true")">
            <!-- Capture context information -->
            <set-variable name="piiOperationId" value="@(Guid.NewGuid().ToString())" />
            <set-variable name="piiOperationTimestamp" value="@(DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o"))" />
            <set-variable name="piiApiName" value="@(context.Api.Name ?? "unknown")" />
            <set-variable name="piiApiId" value="@(context.Api.Id ?? "unknown")" />
            <set-variable name="piiProductName" value="@(context.Product?.Name ?? "unknown")" />
            <set-variable name="piiProductId" value="@(context.Product?.Id ?? "unknown")" />
            <set-variable name="piiSubscriptionName" value="@(context.Subscription?.Name ?? "unknown")" />
            <set-variable name="piiSubscriptionId" value="@(context.Subscription?.Id ?? "unknown")" />
            <set-variable name="piiOperationName" value="@(context.Operation.Name ?? "unknown")" />
            <set-variable name="targetDeployment" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("targetDeployment") ?? "unknown")" />
            
            <!-- Log to Event Hub using native policy -->
            <log-to-eventhub logger-id="pii-usage-eventhub-logger">@{
                var eventData = new JObject();
                
                // Operation metadata
                eventData["id"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiOperationId");
                eventData["timestamp"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiOperationTimestamp");
                eventData["type"] = "PII_Processing";
                eventData["targetDeployment"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("targetDeployment");
                // Enhanced API and subscription context with content
                eventData["context"] = new JObject {
                    ["api"] = new JObject {
                        ["id"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiApiId"),
                        ["name"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiApiName"),
                        ["operation"] = new JObject {
                            ["id"] = context.Operation.Id ?? "unknown",
                            ["name"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiOperationName"),
                            ["method"] = context.Operation.Method ?? "unknown",
                            ["urlTemplate"] = context.Operation.UrlTemplate ?? "unknown"
                        },
                        ["content"] = new JObject {
                            ["originalRequest"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiInputContent"),
                            ["anonymizedRequest"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiAnonymizedContent"),
                            ["originalResponse"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("originalResponse"),
                            ["deanonymizedResponse"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiDeanonymizedContentOutput")
                        }
                    },
                    ["product"] = new JObject {
                        ["id"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiProductId"),
                        ["name"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiProductName")
                    },
                    ["subscription"] = new JObject {
                        ["id"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiSubscriptionId"),
                        ["name"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiSubscriptionName")
                    }
                };
                
                // Process information
                eventData["process"] = new JObject {
                    ["anonymizationEnabled"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiAnonymizationEnabled") == "true",
                    ["confidenceThreshold"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<double>("piiConfidenceThreshold", 0.8),
                    ["entityCategoryExclusions"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiEntityCategoryExclusions", ""),
                    ["deanonymizationPerformed"] = context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiDeanonymizedContentOutput")
                };
                
                // Results summary
                var mappings = new JArray();
                if (context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiMappings")) {
                    try {
                        mappings = JArray.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiMappings"));
                        eventData["entityCount"] = mappings.Count;
                        
                        // Group entities by category for reporting
                        var categories = new Dictionary<string, int>();
                        foreach (var mapping in mappings) {
                            var placeholder = mapping["placeholder"].ToString();
                            var category = placeholder.TrimStart('<').Split('_')[0];
                            
                            if (!categories.ContainsKey(category)) {
                                categories[category] = 0;
                            }
                            categories[category]++;
                        }
                        
                        var categoryDetails = new JObject();
                        foreach (var category in categories) {
                            categoryDetails[category.Key] = category.Value;
                        }
                        eventData["entityCategories"] = categoryDetails;
                        
                        // Include mappings for detailed audit (can be removed if too verbose)
                        eventData["mappings"] = mappings;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex) {
                        eventData["error"] = "Failed to process mappings: " + ex.Message;
                    }
                }
                
                // Content length metrics (not the actual content)
                if (context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiInputContent")) {
                    eventData["metrics"] = new JObject {
                        ["inputContentLength"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiInputContent", "").Length
                    };
                    
                    if (context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiAnonymizedContent")) {
                        eventData["metrics"]["anonymizedContentLength"] = 
                            context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiAnonymizedContent", "").Length;
                    }
                    
                    // Add deanonymization metrics
                    if (context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiDeanonymizeContentInput")) {
                        eventData["metrics"]["deanonymizeInputLength"] = 
                            context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiDeanonymizeContentInput", "").Length;
                    }
                    
                    if (context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiDeanonymizedContentOutput")) {
                        eventData["metrics"]["deanonymizedOutputLength"] = 
                            context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiDeanonymizedContentOutput", "").Length;
                    }
                }
                
                // Add deanonymization flow details
                eventData["deanonymization"] = new JObject {
                    ["performed"] = context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiDeanonymizedContentOutput"),
                    ["inputSource"] = context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiDeanonymizeContentInput") ? "present" : "missing",
                    ["status"] = context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiDeanonymizedContentOutput") ? "completed" : "not_performed",
                    ["timestamp"] = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")
                };
                
                // Track end-to-end flow
                eventData["processingFlow"] = new JObject {
                    ["anonymization"] = new JObject {
                        ["performed"] = context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiAnonymizedContent"),
                        ["entityCount"] = context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiMappings") ? 
                            JArray.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("piiMappings")).Count : 0
                    },
                    ["deanonymization"] = new JObject {
                        ["performed"] = context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiDeanonymizedContentOutput"),
                        ["success"] = context.Variables.ContainsKey("piiDeanonymizedContentOutput")
                    }
                };
                
                return eventData.ToString();
            }</log-to-eventhub>
        </when>
    </choose>
</fragment>
variables.$fxv#6:
<fragment>
    <!--
        Fragment: Central Cache Manager
        Purpose: Loads the metadata-config JSON, caches it using APIM internal cache for performance,
                 and parses it into individual typed variables for downstream fragments.

        Input Variables:
        - metadata-config: String - Raw JSON configuration from metadata-config fragment

        Output Variables:
        - config-models: JObject - Parsed models configuration (model name -> backend, apiVersion, timeout)
        - config-api-types: JObject - Parsed API types configuration (api-type -> base-path, path-segment, api-version)
        - config-timeout-settings: JObject - Parsed timeout settings (streaming-multiplier)
        - cache-operation: String - Whether config was loaded from "cache-hit" or "cache-miss"

        Cache Behavior:
        - Uses APIM internal cache with version-based key: "metadata-config-v{config-version}"
        - TTL from cache-settings.ttl-seconds (default 300 seconds)
        - Bypass cache by sending header: UAIG-Config-Cache-Bypass: true

        Upstream Dependencies:
        - metadata-config fragment: Provides the raw JSON configuration string
    -->

    <!-- Check for cache bypass header -->
    <set-variable name="cache-bypass" value="@(context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("UAIG-Config-Cache-Bypass", "false").Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))" />

    <!-- Parse the raw metadata config to extract cache settings -->
    <set-variable name="raw-config" value="@{
        var configStr = (string)context.Variables["metadata-config"];
        try {
            return JObject.Parse(configStr.Replace('\'', '\"'));
        } catch {
            return new JObject();
        }
    }" />

    <!-- Extract cache key from config version -->
    <set-variable name="config-cache-key" value="@{
        var config = (JObject)context.Variables["raw-config"];
        var version = config?["cache-settings"]?["config-version"]?.ToString() ?? "1.0.0";
        return "metadata-config-v" + version;
    }" />

    <!-- Extract cache TTL -->
    <set-variable name="config-cache-ttl" value="@{
        var config = (JObject)context.Variables["raw-config"];
        return config?["cache-settings"]?["ttl-seconds"]?.Value<int>() ?? 300;
    }" />

    <!-- Try to retrieve cached config (skip if bypass requested) -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@(!(bool)context.Variables["cache-bypass"])">
            <cache-lookup-value key="@((string)context.Variables["config-cache-key"])" variable-name="cached-config" default-value="" />
        </when>
        <otherwise>
            <set-variable name="cached-config" value="" />
        </otherwise>
    </choose>

    <!-- Determine if we have a cache hit -->
    <set-variable name="cache-operation" value="@{
        var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("cached-config", "");
        return string.IsNullOrEmpty(cached) ? "cache-miss" : "cache-hit";
    }" />

    <!-- On cache miss, store the parsed config -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@((string)context.Variables["cache-operation"] == "cache-miss")">
            <set-variable name="parsed-config" value="@((JObject)context.Variables["raw-config"])" />
            <!-- Store in cache for future requests -->
            <cache-store-value key="@((string)context.Variables["config-cache-key"])" value="@(((JObject)context.Variables["parsed-config"]).ToString())" duration="@((int)context.Variables["config-cache-ttl"])" />
        </when>
        <otherwise>
            <!-- Parse the cached config string back to JObject -->
            <set-variable name="parsed-config" value="@{
                try {
                    return JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["cached-config"]);
                } catch {
                    return (JObject)context.Variables["raw-config"];
                }
            }" />
        </otherwise>
    </choose>

    <!-- Extract individual config sections as typed variables for downstream fragments -->
    <set-variable name="config-models" value="@{
        return ((JObject)context.Variables["parsed-config"])["models"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
    }" />
    <set-variable name="config-api-types" value="@{
        return ((JObject)context.Variables["parsed-config"])["api-types"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
    }" />
    <set-variable name="config-timeout-settings" value="@{
        return ((JObject)context.Variables["parsed-config"])["timeout-settings"] as JObject ?? new JObject();
    }" />

    <trace source="Cache-Manager" severity="information">
        <message>@($"Unified AI - Config loaded ({context.Variables["cache-operation"]}), models: {((JObject)context.Variables["config-models"]).Count}, api-types: {((JObject)context.Variables["config-api-types"]).Count}")</message>
    </trace>
</fragment>
variables.$fxv#7:
<fragment>
    <!--
        Fragment: Request Processor
        Purpose: Analyzes incoming requests to extract routing context (API type, model, path)
                 and parse JSON bodies. Provides foundational variables used by all downstream fragments.
                 Uses centralized 'requestedModel' variable name for compatibility with existing AI Hub Gateway fragments.
                 Sets apiTypeOverrideBackend when api-type config defines an explicit backend.
                 Sets skipBackendUrlRewrite so set-backend-authorization defers URI rewriting to path-builder.

        Input Variables:
        - context.Request.Url.Path: Request path to analyze
        - context.Request.Body: Request body for JSON parsing
        - context.Api.Path: API path prefix to remove
        - config-api-types: API type configuration from central-cache-manager
        - config-models: Models configuration from central-cache-manager

        Output Variables:
        - api-type: Detected API type (openai|inference|responses|responses-v1|openai-v1|geminiopenai)
        - requestedModel: Extracted model identifier (uses same variable name as frag-set-llm-requested-model.xml)
        - routing-processed-path: Request path with API prefix removed (always has leading slash)
        - response-id: Response ID for GET/DELETE operations on responses API
        - parsed-request-body: Parsed JSON object from request body (empty JObject for GET/DELETE or parse failure)
        - selected-api-version: API version for backend requests (model-specific or api-type default)
        - is-streaming: Whether request has stream:true ("true"/"false")
        - apiTypeOverrideBackend: Backend from api-type config (empty if model-based routing should be used)
        - skipBackendUrlRewrite: Always set to "true" — path-builder handles URI construction for Unified AI

        Downstream Consumers:
        - path-builder fragment: Uses api-type, routing-processed-path, response-id for backend path building
        - set-target-backend-pool fragment: Uses requestedModel, apiTypeOverrideBackend for routing
        - set-backend-authorization fragment: Respects skipBackendUrlRewrite to skip URL rewriting
        - set-llm-usage fragment: Uses requestedModel for metrics
        - validate-model-access fragment: Uses requestedModel for access check
        - set-response-headers fragment: Uses routing information for debugging

        Upstream Dependencies:
        - central-cache-manager fragment: Provides config-api-types, config-models
    -->

    <!-- Remove API path prefix: /unified-ai/openai/chat/completions -> /openai/chat/completions -->
    <set-variable name="routing-processed-path" value="@(context.Request.Url.Path.Replace(context.Api.Path, "").TrimStart('/').Insert(0, "/"))" />

    <!-- Short-circuit for GET/DELETE requests (deployment listings, responses API) -->
    <!-- These are handled by operation-level policies and don't need api-type routing -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@(context.Request.Method.Equals("GET", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || context.Request.Method.Equals("DELETE", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
            <set-variable name="api-type" value="non-llm-operation" />
            <set-variable name="requestedModel" value="non-llm-request" />
            <set-variable name="response-id" value="" />
            <set-variable name="selected-api-version" value="" />
            <set-variable name="is-streaming" value="@(false)" />
            <trace source="Request-Processor" severity="information">
                <message>@($"Unified AI - Non-LLM request: {context.Request.Method} {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("routing-processed-path", "n/a")}")</message>
            </trace>
        </when>
        <otherwise>
            <!-- Determine API type from request path by matching against configured base-paths -->
            <set-variable name="api-type" value="@{
                try {
                    var path = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("routing-processed-path", String.Empty).ToLower();
                    var match = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("config-api-types")?.Children<JProperty>()
                        .FirstOrDefault(a => {
                            var basePath = a.Value["base-path"]?.ToString();
                            return !String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath) && path.Contains(basePath);
                        });
                    return match?.Name ?? String.Empty;
                } catch { return String.Empty; }
            }" />

            <!-- Reject requests that don't match any configured API type base-path -->
            <choose>
                <when condition="@(String.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", String.Empty)))">
                    <trace source="Request-Processor-Blocked" severity="error">
                        <message>@($"Unified AI - Blocked request to {context.Request.Method} {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("routing-processed-path", "unknown")} from {context.Request.IpAddress}")</message>
                    </trace>
                    <return-response>
                        <set-status code="403" reason="Forbidden" />
                        <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                            <value>application/json</value>
                        </set-header>
                        <set-body>{"error": {"code": "PathNotAllowed", "message": "The requested path is not allowed."}}</set-body>
                    </return-response>
                </when>
            </choose>

            <!-- Use API type to look up base path and path segment from metadata configuration -->
            <set-variable name="api-type-config" value="@{
        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", "openai");
        return context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("config-api-types")?[apiType] as JObject;
    }" />
    <set-variable name="api-base-path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("api-type-config")?["base-path"]?.ToString() ?? "/openai")" />
    <set-variable name="api-path-segment" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("api-type-config")?["path-segment"]?.ToString() ?? String.Empty)" />

    <!-- Set apiTypeOverrideBackend when api-type config defines an explicit backend (e.g., responses → responses-backend) -->
    <!-- This tells set-target-backend-pool to bypass pool-based model matching and use this backend directly -->
    <set-variable name="apiTypeOverrideBackend" value="@{
        var apiTypeConfig = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("api-type-config");
        return apiTypeConfig?["backend"]?.ToString() ?? String.Empty;
    }" />

    <!-- Signal that path-builder handles URI construction — set-backend-authorization should skip URL rewriting -->
    <set-variable name="skipBackendUrlRewrite" value="true" />

    <!-- Parse request body for POST/PUT/PATCH methods -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@(context.Request.Method == "GET" || context.Request.Method == "DELETE")">
            <!-- No body for these methods -->
        </when>
        <otherwise>
            <set-variable name="parsed-request-body" value="@{
                try {
                    return JObject.Parse(context.Request.Body.As<string>(preserveContent: true));
                } catch {
                    return new JObject();
                }
            }" />
            <!-- Detect if request is streaming -->
            <set-variable name="is-streaming" value="@{
                var body = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("parsed-request-body");
                var streamValue = body?["stream"];
                return streamValue != null && streamValue.Type == JTokenType.Boolean && streamValue.Value<bool>();
            }" />
        </otherwise>
    </choose>

    <!-- Extract model from request body or path, using 'requestedModel' for AI Hub Gateway compatibility -->
    <set-variable name="requestedModel" value="@{
        try {
            var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", "openai");
            var method = context.Request.Method;

            // GET requests are non-LLM operations (deployment listings, etc.)
            if (method.Equals("GET", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return "non-llm-request";
            }

            // DELETE requests on responses API don't need a model
            if (method.Equals("DELETE", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && apiType.StartsWith("responses"))
            {
                return "non-llm-request";
            }

            // Try body first (works for all API types)
            var bodyModel = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("parsed-request-body")?["model"]?.ToString();
            if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(bodyModel))
            {
                return bodyModel;
            }

            // Try path extraction using api-path-segment (e.g., /openai/deployments/{model}/...)
            var segment = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-path-segment", String.Empty);
            if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(segment))
            {
                var path = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("routing-processed-path", String.Empty);
                var idx = path.IndexOf(segment + "/", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                if (idx >= 0)
                {
                    var afterSegment = path.Substring(idx + segment.Length + 1);
                    var modelName = afterSegment.Split('/')[0];
                    if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(modelName))
                    {
                        return modelName;
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch { }
        return String.Empty;
    }" />

    <!-- Validate that model parameter is present (skip for non-LLM requests) -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@((string)context.Variables["requestedModel"] == "non-llm-request")">
            <!-- Non-LLM request (e.g., GET operations like listing models) - skip model validation -->
        </when>
        <when condition="@(string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables["requestedModel"]))">
            <return-response>
                <set-status code="400" reason="Bad Request" />
                <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                    <value>application/json</value>
                </set-header>
                <set-body>@{
                    return new JObject(
                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                            new JProperty("message", "Model could not be detected from request body or path"),
                            new JProperty("type", "invalid_request_error"),
                            new JProperty("code", "missing_model_parameter"),
                            new JProperty("param", "model")
                        ))
                    ).ToString();
                }</set-body>
            </return-response>
        </when>
    </choose>

    <!-- Determine response ID from request path (for responses API GET/DELETE operations) -->
    <set-variable name="response-id" value="@{
        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", "openai");
        var method = context.Request.Method;
        if (!apiType.StartsWith("responses") || (method != "GET" && method != "DELETE")) {
            return String.Empty;
        }
        var path = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("routing-processed-path", String.Empty);
        return path.Substring(path.LastIndexOf('/') + 1);
    }" />

    <!-- Determine API version from model config or api-type config -->
    <set-variable name="selected-api-version" value="@{
        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", "openai");
        var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("requestedModel", "unknown");
        var models = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("config-models");
        var apiTypeConfig = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<JObject>("api-type-config");

        // Model-specific API versions
        var modelConfig = models?[modelId];
        if (modelConfig != null) {
            if (apiType.Equals("inference", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && modelConfig["inferenceApiVersion"] != null) {
                return modelConfig["inferenceApiVersion"].ToString();
            }
            if (apiType.Equals("openai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && modelConfig["apiVersion"] != null) {
                return modelConfig["apiVersion"].ToString();
            }
        }

        // Fall back to api-type config version
        var apiTypeVersion = apiTypeConfig?["api-version"]?.ToString();
        if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(apiTypeVersion)) {
            return apiTypeVersion;
        }

        // Fallback defaults
        return apiType.Equals("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? "2025-03-01-preview" : "2024-10-21";
    }" />

    <trace source="Request-Processor" severity="information">
        <message>@($"Unified AI - Request processed: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("routing-processed-path", "n/a")} | API: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", "n/a")} | Model: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("requestedModel", "n/a")} | Streaming: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<bool>("is-streaming", false)}")</message>
    </trace>
        </otherwise>
    </choose>
</fragment>

<fragment>
    <!--
        Fragment: Path Builder
        Purpose: Reconstructs backend URI paths from known components to ensure all requests route
                 to valid endpoints only. Simplifies client requests by auto-injecting api-version
                 and model fields.

        Path Construction by API Type:
        - Gemini/OpenAI-v1: {api-base-path}/chat/completions
        - Responses API:    {api-base-path} or {api-base-path}/{response-id}
        - Inference API:    {api-base-path}/chat/completions
        - Default OpenAI:   {api-base-path}/deployments/{model}/chat/completions

        Input Variables (from request-processor):
        - api-type: Detected API type
        - api-base-path: Base path for the API type
        - requestedModel: Extracted model identifier
        - response-id: Response ID for GET/DELETE operations on responses API
        - selected-api-version: API version for backend requests

        Output Variables:
        - finalPath: Reconstructed path for backend routing

        Upstream Dependencies:
        - request-processor fragment: Provides all input variables
    -->

    <!-- Skip path building for non-LLM requests (deployment listings handled by operation policies) -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("requestedModel", "") == "non-llm-request")">
            <!-- Non-LLM request - path rewriting skipped, operation-level policy handles response -->
        </when>
        <otherwise>
            <!-- Reconstruct request paths based on API type -->
            <choose>
                <!-- Gemini OpenAI API and OpenAI v1: {api-base-path}/chat/completions -->
                <when condition="@{
                    var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type");
                    return apiType.Equals("geminiopenai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || apiType.Equals("openai-v1", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                }">
                    <set-variable name="finalPath" value="@{
                        var basePath = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-base-path", String.Empty);
                        return !String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath) ? $"{basePath}/chat/completions" : String.Empty;
                    }" />
                    <set-body>@(context.Request.Body.As<string>())</set-body>
                </when>
                <!-- Responses and Inference APIs -->
                <when condition="@{
                    var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", String.Empty);
                    return apiType.StartsWith("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || apiType.Equals("inference", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                }">
                    <set-variable name="finalPath" value="@{
                        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", String.Empty);
                        var basePath = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-base-path", String.Empty);
                        var responseId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("response-id", String.Empty);

                        if (String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath)) {
                            return String.Empty;
                        }

                        // Responses API
                        if (apiType.StartsWith("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
                            var includeResponseId = !String.IsNullOrEmpty(responseId) && (context.Request.Method == "GET" || context.Request.Method == "DELETE");
                            return includeResponseId ? $"{basePath}/{responseId}" : basePath;
                        }

                        // Inference API: {api-base-path}/chat/completions
                        return $"{basePath}/chat/completions";
                    }" />
                    <choose>
                        <!-- Override api-version for responses and inference (v1 infers version from path) -->
                        <when condition="@{
                            var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type", String.Empty);
                            return apiType == "responses" || apiType == "inference";
                        }">
                            <set-query-parameter name="api-version" exists-action="override">
                                <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("selected-api-version"))</value>
                            </set-query-parameter>
                        </when>
                    </choose>
                </when>
                <!-- Default OpenAI: {api-base-path}/deployments/{model}/chat/completions -->
                <otherwise>
                    <set-variable name="finalPath" value="@{
                        var basePath = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-base-path", String.Empty);
                        var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("requestedModel", String.Empty);

                        return !String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath) && !String.IsNullOrEmpty(modelId)
                            ? $"{basePath}/deployments/{modelId}/chat/completions"
                            : String.Empty;
                    }" />
                    <!-- Add model field into request body if not present -->
                    <set-body>@{
                        var body = context.Request.Body.As<string>();
                        if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(body)) {
                            try {
                                var parsedBody = JObject.Parse(body);
                                var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("requestedModel", String.Empty);
                                if (parsedBody["model"] == null || String.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedBody["model"].ToString())) {
                                    parsedBody["model"] = modelId;
                                }
                                return parsedBody.ToString();
                            } catch {
                                return body;
                            }
                        }
                        return body;
                    }</set-body>
                    <set-query-parameter name="api-version" exists-action="override">
                        <value>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("selected-api-version"))</value>
                    </set-query-parameter>
                </otherwise>
            </choose>

            <!-- Handle path configuration errors -->
            <choose>
                <when condition="@(String.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("finalPath", String.Empty)))">
                    <trace source="Path-Builder-Error" severity="error">
                        <message>@($"Unified AI - Path builder error for API type: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type")}")</message>
                    </trace>
                    <return-response>
                        <set-status code="500" reason="Internal Server Error" />
                        <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                            <value>application/json</value>
                        </set-header>
                        <set-body>@{
                            return new JObject(
                                new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("code", "PathBuildError"),
                                    new JProperty("message", $"No path determined for API type: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("api-type")}")
                                ))
                            ).ToString();
                        }</set-body>
                    </return-response>
                </when>
            </choose>

            <!-- Rewrite URI with validated path -->
            <rewrite-uri template="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("finalPath"))" copy-unmatched-params="true" />
        </otherwise>
    </choose>
</fragment>

<fragment>
    <!--
        Fragment: Security Handler (Unified)
        Purpose: Provides unified authentication across all AI Hub Gateway API endpoints
                 (Azure OpenAI API, Universal LLM API, Unified AI API).
                 Supports layered auth: API Key is always required (APIM subscription validation),
                 JWT is optionally enforced per-product via the 'jwtRequired' context variable.
                 
                 Compatible with any OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect identity provider
                 (Microsoft Entra ID, Auth0, Okta, etc.) via configurable APIM named values.

        Input Variables:
        - api-key header: API key for subscription-based authentication
        - Authorization header: Bearer token for JWT authentication
        - jwtRequired (optional): Set by product policy to "true" to enforce JWT validation in addition to API key.
                                    When not set or "false", JWT validation is skipped even if a Bearer token is present.
        - jwtAudience (optional): Custom audience override. Falls back to {{JWT-AppRegistrationId}} named value
        - jwtIssuer (optional): Custom issuer override. Falls back to {{JWT-Issuer}} named value
        - jwtOpenIdConfigUrl (optional): Custom OpenID config URL override. Falls back to {{JWT-OpenIdConfigUrl}} named value
        - requiredRoles (optional): Set by product policy. Comma-separated list of required app roles (e.g., "Models.Read,Agent.Read").
                                    If set, at least one role must be present in the JWT 'roles' claim. If empty/unset, no role check is performed.

        Output Variables:
        - auth-type: String - Authentication type ("api-key", "jwt", "api-key-jwt", "none")
        - subscription-name: String - Subscription name or JWT username
        - user-id: String - User identifier from JWT claim or subscription name
        - jwt-roles: String - Comma-separated list of app roles from the JWT token (empty if no JWT or no roles claim)

        Upstream Dependencies (required only when JWT is enabled and no custom overrides are set):
        - APIM named values:
          - JWT-OpenIdConfigUrl: OpenID Connect discovery endpoint (e.g., https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant}/v2.0/.well-known/openid-configuration)
          - JWT-Issuer: Expected token issuer (e.g., https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant}/v2.0)
          - JWT-AppRegistrationId: Expected audience claim (e.g., api://{client-id})
    -->

    <!-- Determine authentication method used in request -->
    <set-variable name="auth-type" value="@{
        var apiKey = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("api-key", String.Empty);
        var authHeader = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization", String.Empty);
        var hasApiKey = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(apiKey);
        var hasBearer = authHeader.StartsWith("Bearer ", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        if (hasApiKey && hasBearer) { return "api-key-jwt"; }
        if (hasApiKey) { return "api-key"; }
        if (hasBearer) { return "jwt"; }
        return "none";
    }" />

    <!-- Get subscription name for tracking -->
    <set-variable name="subscription-name" value="@(context.Subscription?.Name ?? "anonymous")" />

    <!-- API Key validation: subscription must exist (APIM validates the key itself via subscription_required=true) -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@(context.Subscription == null)">
            <return-response>
                <set-status code="401" reason="Unauthorized" />
                <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                    <value>application/json</value>
                </set-header>
                <set-body>@{
                    return new JObject(
                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                            new JProperty("message", "Access denied. A valid API key is required via 'api-key' header."),
                            new JProperty("code", "unauthorized")
                        ))
                    ).ToString();
                }</set-body>
            </return-response>
        </when>
    </choose>

    <!-- Set default user-id from subscription -->
    <set-variable name="user-id" value="@(context.Subscription?.Name ?? "anonymous")" />

    <!-- Pre-load APIM named values as fallback defaults for JWT settings -->
    <!-- Product policies can override these by setting jwtAudience, jwtIssuer, jwtOpenIdConfigUrl -->
    <set-variable name="_nv-jwt-audience" value="{{JWT-AppRegistrationId}}" />
    <set-variable name="_nv-jwt-openid-config" value="{{JWT-OpenIdConfigUrl}}" />
    <set-variable name="_nv-jwt-issuer" value="{{JWT-Issuer}}" />

    <!-- JWT validation (only when jwtRequired is set to "true" by product policy) -->
    <choose>
        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwtRequired", "false").Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
            <!-- Check if JWT Bearer token is actually present -->
            <choose>
                <when condition="@{
                    var authType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("auth-type", "none");
                    return !authType.Contains("jwt");
                }">
                    <!-- JWT required but no Bearer token provided -->
                    <choose>
                        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwtRequired", "false").Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
                            <return-response>
                                <set-status code="401" reason="Unauthorized" />
                                <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                                    <value>application/json</value>
                                </set-header>
                                <set-body>@{
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "JWT Bearer token is required for this product. Provide via 'Authorization: Bearer {token}' header."),
                                            new JProperty("code", "jwt_required")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }</set-body>
                            </return-response>
                        </when>
                    </choose>
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    <!-- JWT token is present, validate it -->
                    <!-- Resolve JWT settings: use product-level overrides if set, otherwise fall back to APIM named values -->
                    <set-variable name="jwt-audience" value="@{
                        var custom = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwtAudience", "");
                        return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(custom) ? custom : context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("_nv-jwt-audience", "");
                    }" />
                    <set-variable name="jwt-openid-config" value="@{
                        var custom = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwtOpenIdConfigUrl", "");
                        return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(custom) ? custom : context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("_nv-jwt-openid-config", "");
                    }" />
                    <set-variable name="jwt-issuer" value="@{
                        var custom = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwtIssuer", "");
                        return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(custom) ? custom : context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("_nv-jwt-issuer", "");
                    }" />

                    <!-- Verify JWT settings are configured -->
                    <choose>
                        <when condition="@{
                            var audience = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-audience");
                            var openidConfig = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-openid-config");
                            var issuer = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-issuer");
                            return string.IsNullOrEmpty(audience) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(openidConfig) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(issuer);
                        }">
                            <return-response>
                                <set-status code="503" reason="Service Unavailable" />
                                <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                                    <value>application/json</value>
                                </set-header>
                                <set-body>@{
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "JWT authentication is not configured properly on the gateway."),
                                            new JProperty("code", "jwt_not_configured")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }</set-body>
                            </return-response>
                        </when>
                    </choose>

                    <!-- Validate JWT Bearer token -->
                    <validate-jwt header-name="Authorization" require-scheme="Bearer" output-token-variable-name="validated-jwt" failed-validation-httpcode="401" failed-validation-error-message="Access denied due to invalid or expired JWT bearer token.">
                        <openid-config url="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-openid-config"))" />
                        <audiences>
                            <audience>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-audience"))</audience>
                        </audiences>
                        <issuers>
                            <issuer>@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-issuer"))</issuer>
                        </issuers>
                    </validate-jwt>

                    <!-- Extract identity from JWT token (azp claim for client credentials flow) -->
                    <set-variable name="user-id" value="@{
                        var jwt = (Jwt)context.Variables["validated-jwt"];
                        return jwt.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("azp", context.Subscription?.Name ?? "anonymous");
                    }" />

                    <!-- Extract app roles from JWT token -->
                    <set-variable name="jwt-roles" value="@{
                        var jwt = (Jwt)context.Variables["validated-jwt"];
                        var roles = jwt.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("roles", "");
                        return roles ?? "";
                    }" />

                    <trace source="Authentication-JWT" severity="information">
                        <message>@($"Unified AI - JWT authenticated: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("user-id", "unknown")} | Roles: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-roles", "none")} | Path: {context.Request.Url.Path}")</message>
                    </trace>

                    <!-- App role authorization: enforce requiredRoles if set by product policy -->
                    <choose>
                        <when condition="@{
                            var requiredRoles = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("requiredRoles", "");
                            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(requiredRoles)) { return false; }
                            var tokenRoles = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-roles", "");
                            var required = requiredRoles.Split(',').Select(r => r.Trim()).Where(r => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(r));
                            var actual = tokenRoles.Split(',').Select(r => r.Trim()).Where(r => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(r));
                            return !required.Any(r => actual.Any(a => a.Equals(r, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)));
                        }">
                            <return-response>
                                <set-status code="403" reason="Forbidden" />
                                <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                                    <value>application/json</value>
                                </set-header>
                                <set-body>@{
                                    var requiredRoles = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("requiredRoles", "");
                                    var tokenRoles = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-roles", "");
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "Access denied. Required app role not found in token."),
                                            new JProperty("code", "insufficient_role"),
                                            new JProperty("required_roles", requiredRoles),
                                            new JProperty("token_roles", string.IsNullOrEmpty(tokenRoles) ? "none" : tokenRoles)
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }</set-body>
                            </return-response>
                        </when>
                    </choose>
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
        </when>
    </choose>

    <!-- Remove api-key header to prevent it from being passed to backend endpoints -->
    <set-header name="api-key" exists-action="delete" />

    <trace source="Authentication-Complete" severity="information">
        <message>@($"Unified AI - Auth: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("auth-type", "none")} | User: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("user-id", "anonymous")} | Roles: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("jwt-roles", "none")} | Sub: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<string>("subscription-name", "none")}")</message>
    </trace>
</fragment>

properties.description: Tracks usage of all AI-related APIs with flexible dimensions for models, features, and more
Raises custom events when throttling limits are hit through App Insights metrics, for proactive monitoring and alerting
Anonymizes personally identifiable information (PII) in API requests
Deanonymizes personally identifiable information (PII) in API responses when needed for backend processing
Saves the state of personally identifiable information (PII) for testing & validation purposes
Ensures compatibility with Microsoft Foundry CORS requirements
Caches metadata configuration for Unified AI API performance
Analyzes incoming Unified AI requests to extract routing context
Reconstructs backend URI paths for Unified AI API routing
Unified authentication handler for all AI Gateway APIs (API Key + optional JWT per-product)
Adds UAIG-* response headers when enableResponseHeaders is true
